aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some structured data and localized content but lacks depth in content optimization and user engagement signals.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a strong Google Business Profile with positive reviews.
Enhance website content with targeted keywords and location-specific information to improve local search visibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords to improve search engine understanding of the site's content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not have a visible Google Business Profile, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile found, leading to missed opportunities for local search presence.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement metrics that could boost local search rankings.

nap_citations.summary: The business has some basic contact information on the website but lacks consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
List the business in relevant local directories and industry-specific platforms.
Verify and claim listings in major citation sources like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of Google Business Profile and customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in Gastonia, North Carolina
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up and optimizing a Google Business Profile and generating initial customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and building backlinks from local and industry-relevant websites
